title: Will it Blend - YouTube Poop
description:
Tom Dickson tries to blend Ganon, Deepercutt and some other stuff which is theoretically supposed to create a YouTube Poop. The blending has some unexpected side effects, however.

I realize the PINGAS song at the start is really lame when compared to the classics like "The Final Pingas" by M3L33MA5T3R, but i didn't really spend any more than 10 minutes on that part of it.

Video:
Will it blend
Gex
Lego Milhouse
Fresh Prince
AoStH
MoldyToasterVideo's "Will it Blend? - A Blender"
Faces of Evil

Other audio:
Mama luigi
wtf Boom
